case_metadata.court: Armed Services Board of Contract Appeals
case_metadata.project_type: dam construction - outlet structures and cutoff walls at Addicks and Barker dams

nodes.description: Hurricane Harvey made landfall in Texas, bringing heavy rain and flooding to the Houston area including the project site at Addicks and Barker Dams.
nodes.source_excerpt: Hurricane Harvey made landfall on the coast of Texas bringing rain and flooding to the Houston area including the project site

nodes.description: US Army Corps of Engineers issued a suspension of work order for construction activities at Addicks and Barker dam sites due to Hurricane Harvey flooding.
nodes.source_excerpt: COE directed suspension of work retroactive to August 28, 2017 through October 15, 2017 totaling 49 calendar days

extraction_notes: The suspension order appears to be a government-directed work stoppage rather than a traditional site possession delay, but fits best under late_possession_of_site as it prevented access to work areas
